name: pip-skills
description: A curated collection of Claude Code skills for serious engineering work. Covers the full development lifecycle — PR review, architectural auditing, security scanning, test generation, documentation, debugging, and more.

skills.name: pr-review
skills.description: Thorough review of the current git diff / pull request for code quality, security, and best practices.

skills.name: arch-audit
skills.description: Architectural audit of the codebase — identifies structural risks, coupling, and improvement opportunities.

skills.name: code-review
skills.description: Focused code review of a specific file or function with actionable feedback.

skills.name: test-gen
skills.description: Generates comprehensive unit and integration tests for the specified code.

skills.name: refactor
skills.description: Analyses code and suggests concrete refactoring improvements for readability, maintainability, and performance.

skills.name: security-scan
skills.description: Performs a security-focused review of the codebase or a specific file, identifying vulnerabilities and suggesting fixes.

skills.name: docs-gen
skills.description: Generates clear, structured documentation for a module, class, or function.

skills.name: commit-msg
skills.description: Generates a conventional-commit message based on the current staged diff.

skills.name: debug-assist
skills.description: Systematic debugging assistant — traces errors, suggests root causes, and proposes fixes.

skills.name: changelog
skills.description: Generates a changelog entry from recent git commits, following Keep a Changelog conventions.
